name: OWASP_A04_Path_Traversal_Detection
search: index="web_logs" method IN ("GET", "POST", "HEAD") | search uri="*/etc/passwd*" OR uri="*../*" OR uri="*..\\*" OR uri="*/config/*" OR uri="*/backup/*" | iplocation clientip | fillnull value="Unknown" Country, City | stats count as violation_count, values(uri) as attempted_paths, latest(_time) as last_seen by clientip, Country, City | fieldformat last_seen = strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval OWASP_Category="A04:2021-Insecure Design", Alert="Path Traversal / Qadağan Olunmuş Qovluğa Giriş" | sort - last_seen | table last_seen, clientip, Country, City, violation_count, attempted_paths, Alert
description: Serverin həssas qovluqlarına və ya kataloqdan kənara çıxma (dot-dot-slash) cəhdlərini aşkarlayır.
